name: BloomCredit
description: Developer of a financial analysis technology designed to improve the eligibility of people who declined lending products. The company's technology uses a data-driven approach to offer actionable advice, insights, and guidance, working directly with lenders, to graduate their applicants through consumer credit analysis, ongoing credit monitoring, and alerting lenders as per eligibility requirements, enabling consumers to improve their financial health and loan eligibility.

name: Boon
description: Boon is the world’s most agile referral hiring platform that scales across your entire community to deliver better hires, faster.

name: Cadence
description: Developer of a language service platform designed to connect clients with the top linguist talents and technologies. The company's language platform uses big data with a human touch to translate languages and its real-time translation increases the speeds of multilingual meetings, enabling corporate and other organizations to browse, find and hire language translators and interpreters and translate their conferences.

name: Clanbeat
description: Developer of a talent development platform designed to facilitate students and adults in driving their own learning and being well-balanced human beings along that journey. The company's platform helps students build positive learning habits with regular reflection nudges, work planner, and goal-setting features and allow teachers to collect on students' mood and well-being from actionable insights and data, empowering students and teachers everywhere to take the lead in their life and learning.

name: Cybewrite
description: Developer of a cyber insurance risk quantification technology platform intended to offer a full stack of solutions to sell, underwrite and manage the risk of cyber policies. The company's platform offers real-time on-demand cyber risk assessment of any business for use cases of cyber insurance and vendor risk management, enabling brokers to sell more policies in an efficient and profitable manner for both the brokers and the reinsurers.

name: Digital Mortar
description: Developer of an in-store customer tracking system designed to provide full path customer analytics. The company's full SaaS in-store customer tracking system includes video and camera tracking and is designed to provide robust cloud-based data collection and integration of (PoS), enabling brick-and-mortar retailers to drive store layout, merchandising, and staff optimization.

name: Court Buddy
description: Operator of a legal marketplace intended to assist consumers in connecting with local independent attorneys. The company's platform matches attorneys who provide a-la-carte legal services at fixed rates with clients, enabling users to get access to an attorney when needed.

name: Nazar
description: Developer of a cloud-based application designed to help in database performance monitoring. The company's cloud-based application specializes in agentless database performance monitoring to keep applications running fast and reduce infrastructure costs, enabling businesses to perform database analysis and quality monitoring for all tasks.

name: CTY
description: Developer of a computer vision sensing platform designed to empower cities with data to become responsive and equitable. The company's platform measures and predicts volume counts, paths, speeds, interactions, and other behaviors of pedestrians, bicycles, vehicles, wheelchairs, travelers, and objects in streets, enabling businesses to plan and invest in infrastructure in the public right of way to prevent the collection of personally identifiable information and to provide intelligence without surveillance.

name: Alta5
description: Developer of a stock market analysis platform designed to build bots for the stock market. The company's stock market analysis platform offers to backtest, automate, and run the entire algorithmic trading strategies with no coding, enabling investors to track their stock data on stock markets to improve efficiency and make proper financial decisions.

name: Preteckt
description: Building the AI vehicle diagnostic technician.

name: AskSenti
description: Developer of a text and sentiment analytics engine designed to automate, support and survey feedback tagging. The company's engine tags support queries, understand trends and share them widely, enabling businesses to prioritize projects accordingly and retain more customers.

name: Shoelace
description: Provider of an artificial intelligence-powered virtual assistant tool intended to help brands implement customer journey marketing. The company's tool helps e-commerce merchants launch retargeting campaigns on social media as well as takes visitors through a brand experience after they leave the store and keeps them engaged with a sequence of ad experiences, enabling brands to recapture visitors who abandon their website and increase sales.

name: Smile Identity
description: Developer of an identity management platform designed to monitor customer records easily. The company's platform includes a neutral network of image recognition algorithms and a turnkey service for any bank, telecom, or application-based service that needs remote biometric enrollment, ID validation, and authentication with no special hardware, enabling companies to scale rapidly by confirming the true identity of their users in real time, using any smartphone or computer.

name: TrueCare24
description: Developer of an on-demand mobile platform designed for finding and managing reliable and affordable caregivers directly, as well as other services for seniors. The company's platform offers access to on-demand doctors with phone or video, in-home in person, or at-work consultation availability in a short span of time, enabling users to book and avail of home-based care at their convenience.

name: UrbanLogiq
description: Developer of urban data analytics platform designed to equip public officials with the tools to build safe, strong, and resilient communities. The company's platform permits tracking and visualization of business data, gathering of actionable intelligence and early warning indicators, as well as tracking of transportation and traffic data, enabling governments to generate fast insights in one platform without any data wrangling or specialized training.

name: Via Global Health
description: Operator of a medical supplies marketplace intended to connect medical distributors with affordable medical device manufacturers. The company provides access to difficult-to-source supplies that make it faster, easier, and more affordable to address points of friction that exist between buyers and sellers of medical products through e-catalog and supporting services like logistics, enabling healthcare equipment suppliers to connect with a network of verified local distributors.

name: Win-Win
description: Developer of a sports gaming platform intended to help raise funds for charitable trusts while supporting fantasy football tournaments. The company's technology has a ticketing application for users to buy tickets for fantasy sports, raise funds, and choose and pitch for their favorite athletes, enabling sports lovers to support sports for social good.

name: BenRevo
description: Provider of an online platform intended to sell and buy insurance products. The company's online platform automates manual tasks, helps to shop, compare and complete the purchasing of polices online, automates the paper heavy installation process, limiting redundant work and minimizing frequent errors and capture data and provide analytics, enabling the health insurance industry to get linked to the fragmented distribution process.

name: Friendly Data
description: Developer of a natural language interface designed to integrate human voice and text into queries to simplify sorting through data. The company's interface translates human language into SQL query and then returns data in JSON format, enabling businesses to increase user engagement and employees productivity by providing natural language interface for databases.

name: Cyberpsyc
description: Provider of on-demand online therapy for mental health issues designed to keep mental health in check. The company's on-demand online therapy for mental health is a self-help interactive therapy and specializes in providing computerized cognitive behavioral therapy (CCBT) for the treatment of stress, anxiety and depression, enabling students to get help for their mental well-being.

name: LittleFund
description: Developer of a mobile application designed for financial wellness of children. The company develops an application based smart savings and gift tool enabling parents to teach and enhance their child's financial skills.

name: Funderful
description: Provider of a Web-based alumni fundraising management platform created to help universities manage and grow their annual giving programs. The company's platform displays contributions in a series of real-time infographics, allowing everyone to instantly compare results enabling fundraising organizations to structure, follow, track and analyze the donations campaigns..

name: Govlist
description: Provider of a data-driven platform designed to streamline the IT procurement process and improve the quality of public digital services offered by the government. The company's data-driven platform has an inbuilt analytics dashboard that tracks and optimizes government purchasing through automation and data analytics, makes intelligent decisions by leveraging valuable data and insights, makes procurement faster by automating and organizing documents, forms, and paperwork in one place, enabling local governments and vendors to improve IT procurement and amplify government sales respectively.

name: Hyphen
description: Developer of a real-time employee engagement platform designed to help employees to express themselves. The company's platform offers actionable analytics based on pulse surveys and anonymous crowd-sourced employee conversations, enabling companies to boost employee retention, productivity and satisfaction.

name: YayPay
description: Developer of a SaaS-based predictive AR workflow software designed to accelerate cash flow and automate accounts receivables. The company's predictive AR workflow software is a finance workflow software that automates payment work flows for invoice collection process, leverages data and automatic payment communications, through big data and machine learning algorithms in order to measures credit risk and historical payment behavior of debtors, enabling back-office finance teams to accelerate collections, improve customer relationships and predict cash flow.
